name: Tamarac (Envestnet) Portfolio Management API
what_it_does: Tamarac (Envestnet) advisor portfolio management REST API for rebalancing, performance reporting, and fee billing for RIA practices. Enables AI agents to manage portfolio rebalancing and trade order generation for investment operations automation, handle performance calculation and client reporting for advisor reporting workflow, access fee billing and invoice generation for RIA revenue management, retrieve account and household management data for advisor client operations, manage model portfolio construction and drift monitoring for systematic investment management, handle custodian data aggregation from multiple custodians for unified portfolio view, access compliance and audit reporting for RIA regulatory requirements, retrieve financial planning data integration for holistic wealth management workflow, manage advisor portal and client portal customization for advisor practice management, and integrate Tamarac with Envestnet data intelligence, MoneyGuidePro, and custodian platforms.
use_cases: Rebalancing portfolios from investment operations agents
Calculating performance from client reporting agents
Billing advisory fees from RIA revenue agents
Monitoring portfolio drift from model management agents
not_for: Individual retail investors without RIA intermediary
Institutional asset managers without retail wealth focus
Non-RIA financial services without portfolio management
best_when: An RIA using Tamarac (Envestnet) wanting AI agents to automate portfolio rebalancing, performance reporting, fee billing, account management, and multi-custodian data aggregation.
avoid_when: SEC FIDUCIARY DUTY: Automated rebalancing must verify suitability and client-specific restrictions before execution; automated rebalancing ignoring tax situations, client restrictions, or concentrated positions creates fiduciary violation. Envestnet ecosystem lock-in — Tamarac operates within Envestnet platform ecosystem; automated workflows dependent on Tamarac may be affected by Envestnet strategic decisions and platform evolution. GIPS performance accuracy — automated performance calculation must handle all GIPS requirements including composite construction, portability, and presentation; GIPS errors create investor misleading disclosure. Multi-custodian reconciliation — automated data aggregation from multiple custodians must handle timing differences and reconciliation failures; automated portfolio reporting with unreconciled positions creates inaccurate performance data.

auth.notes: Tamarac uses OAuth 2.0. REST API with JSON. Seattle, Washington HQ. Founded 2000. Acquired by Envestnet (ENV NYSE) in 2012. Envestnet subsidiary. 1,800+ RIA clients. $500B+ AUM on platform. RIA-focused portfolio management and reporting. Competes with Orion, Black Diamond (SS&C), and Addepar for RIA technology.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — AUM-based or per-account enterprise subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: AUM-tiered annual subscription; per-account pricing available
pricing.notes: Seattle, Washington. Envestnet (ENV NYSE) subsidiary. Founded 2000. Acquired 2012. 1,800+ RIA clients. $500B+ AUM.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; batch rebalancing is async

known_agent_gotchas: SEC FIDUCIARY REBALANCING: Automated rebalancing must check account-level restrictions, tax optimization settings, and household concentration before order generation; automated rebalancing that ignores restricted securities or tax lots creates fiduciary duty violation
No webhooks — rebalancing completion and account data updates require polling; no push notifications for trade execution or portfolio event completion

Envestnet platform dependency — Tamarac is deeply integrated with Envestnet data intelligence platform; automated workflows must account for Envestnet ecosystem data latency and platform maintenance windows

Multi-custodian reconciliation lag — automated portfolio reporting must handle custodian data delivery timing; positions or transactions not yet delivered from custodian create stale or inaccurate automated reports

Tax lot handling in rebalancing — automated rebalancing trade generation must apply correct tax lot selection per client instructions; automated FIFO vs specific ID selection error creates unexpected client tax liability

GIPS composite construction — automated performance reporting for GIPS composites must correctly include and exclude accounts per composite criteria; automated composite management with incorrect account inclusion creates GIPS compliance gap
agent_readiness.security_notes: Wealth management tech. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Portfolio and client financial data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Wealthtech. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Portfolio and wealth management data.
